signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% YoY IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0%; BoK HOLDS RATE AT 2.5% AMID IRAN WAR-INDUCED IMPORT SURGE | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling renewed pressures from a sharp import price surge—over 16% month-on-month, the highest since the 199
